# Code Blocks Note

## TypeScript Code

```typescript
interface Person {
  name: string;
  age: number;
}

function greet(person: Person): string {
  return `Hello, ${person.name}!`;
}
```

## JavaScript Code

```javascript
const greeting = "Hello, World!";
console.log(greeting);
```

## Python Code

```python
def hello():
    print("Hello, World!")
```

## Inline Code

Use `console.log()` for debugging.

## Code with Backticks

You can use `` `backticks` `` for inline code.
